error_signature: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
title: 404 error when loading resources in custom HTML element
symptom: The console displays a 404 error when trying to load resources linked in a custom HTML element on the published website.
applies_when: Resources linked in the page head and body
not_this_if: Resources load correctly in development mode
root_cause: The 404 error occurs because the resource URL is incorrectly formed, possibly due to the 'refresh on resize' feature causing the element to reload improperly, leading to a request for a null resource.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the custom HTML element
Save the changes and republish the project
agent_instruction: Disable the 'refresh on resize' option in the custom HTML element settings.
